name: Rice Pudding 5
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the sugar and flour.
2. Beat the eggs until frothy.
3. Gradually add the mixture to the flour, along with the remaining ingredients except oleo or butter.
4. Melt the oleo in a baking dish.
5. Pour the pudding mixture into the baking dish containing the melted oleo.
6. Bake at 300 degrees Fahrenheit until the top is slightly browned. Do not overbake.
(Note: This recipe was provided by Jean Abercrombie of Raceland, LA, from A/O/G Louisiana Women's Ministries. Adapted by Lisa Wilson.)
